context: Tests whether the skill uses complaint history appropriately — referencing the genuine pattern (DFW-MIA same-route cancellation recurrence + prior DENIED) while not forcing the unrelated DFW-ORD delay into the narrative. Also tests that pattern references use matter-of-fact tone per the complaint-patterns rule.

checklist.name: Prior DFW-MIA cancellation referenced
checklist.description: The letter references the prior AA923 DFW-MIA cancellation from November 2025 as evidence of a recurring problem — same route, same category, same airline

checklist.name: Prior DENIED resolution cited
checklist.description: The letter mentions that the prior cancellation complaint was denied or inadequately resolved (the $100 voucher offer), using this as escalation leverage

checklist.name: DFW-ORD delay NOT forced into narrative
checklist.description: The letter does NOT reference the DFW-ORD delay as part of the cancellation pattern — it is a different category (delay vs cancellation) on a different route. If mentioned at all, it is not presented as part of the same pattern

checklist.name: Pattern stated matter-of-fact
checklist.description: The complaint history reference uses factual, measured tone — e.g., 'This is the second cancellation on this route in four months' rather than emotional language like 'I cannot believe this keeps happening'

checklist.name: Pattern in opening or airline-vs-reality section
checklist.description: The complaint history reference appears in the opening (loyalty despite adversity) or the airline's-own-words-vs-reality section — NOT in the regulatory or remedy sections

checklist.name: Loyalty opening present
checklist.description: The letter opens with Lisa's Executive Platinum status, 6 years, and/or 1.8M miles before describing the incident

checklist.name: Compensation calibrated to pattern
checklist.description: The requested compensation reflects the escalated situation — higher than what was requested for the first cancellation, given that it was denied and the issue recurred

checklist.name: Complaint bank consulted
checklist.description: The letter or process documentation shows that the complaint bank was checked (complaints-bank.py check) for Lisa Park / AA before writing
